title: Design Thinking Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Design Thinking skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_innovation_challenge.description: A defined innovation challenge or problem space to investigate

access_target_users.description: Access to target users for qualitative research (interviews, observation, shadowing)

stakeholder_alignment_on.description: Stakeholder alignment on the scope and boundaries of the problem

time_allocation_iterative.description: Time allocation for iterative prototyping and testing cycles

existing_customer_research.description: Existing customer research, journey maps, or support data to accelerate the Empathize phase

competitor_analogous_industry.description: Competitor or analogous industry examples to seed the Ideate phase
